description: You are an Operations Manager for a consumer electronics startup designing a functional light manufacturing facility layout in the provided 5,000 sq ft industrial park unit shell. Divide the space into five named zones: Assembly Line, Warehouse Storage, Management Office, Employee Breakroom, and Quality Control (QC) Lab. Enclose the Office, Breakroom, and QC Lab with partition walls and doors, leaving the Assembly and Warehouse areas open. Furnish the Assembly area with at least six workbenches and six stools; the Warehouse with eight industrial shelving units; the Breakroom with a dining table, four chairs, a sink, and two kitchen appliances; and the Office and QC Lab with at least three desks, three office chairs, and two computers. Annotate the layout with at least three text labels for specific stations (e.g., 'Station 1', 'Packaging'). Source all items from the built-in Sweet Home 3D catalog and save the completed project to /home/ga/Documents/facility_layout.sh3d.
